title: Solar Spot Lights Outdoor - 108 LED Warm White Garden Landscape Lights With Dusk-to-Dawn, Waterproof for Pathway, Wall, Porch - 2 Pack
features: 【Super Brightness & Large Solar Panel】Featuring 108 high - brightness LED lamp beads, this solar light delivers an impressive 800 - lumen 3000K light output, a whopping 50% brighter than other ordinary LED solar spot lights. The solar panel can be vertically adjusted up to a maximum angle of 135°, ensuring it can absorb sunlight from all directions. Moreover, the lamp head can be flexibly rotated up and down by 90°, allowing you to easily adapt to different sunlight directions and lighting requirements.

【High-efficient Upgraded Solar Lights】This solar lights outdoor has large monocrystalline silicon solar panel and built-in 1500mAh high-capacity battery, the energy conversion rate is as high as 25%, fulfilling the goal of highly efficient charging, environmental protection and all-night illumination.

【3 Brightness Lighting Modes】This solar lights outdoor garden has 3 brightness lighting modes to choose from. Press the button to get the sequence of low-medium-high-off. Light sensor, no motion sensor. Low Light Mode(24Hrs) / Medium Light Mode(12Hrs) / High Light Mode(8Hrs). The separate solar panel is vertically adjustable up to a maximum angle of 135° to absorb sunlight from full directions, and the lamp head is flexibly rotated up and down by 90°to achieve the desired lighting angle.

【IP65 Waterproof & Durable】Using seamless design, heat and weatherproof ABS material, which will not discolour, sturdy and durable, no unpleasant odour. This solar spotlights is specially designed to withstand extreme weather conditions. Workable under temperature ranging from -20~60°C. Don't worry about the rainy day or all kinds of bad weather, perfect for outdoor use, perfect for outdoor use.

【2-in-1 Installation】Wireless design makes installation easy and portable for outdoor activities. LED spot lights outdoor can be mounted on the wall as a wall light or inserted into the ground as a landscape light (screws and stakes are provided). Suitable for outdoors, garden, yard, patio, camping, garden landscape, christmas halloween festival decor etc.
